description: Style Note Spring Summer 2012 saw statement accessories steal the show on ramps. Now bring this trend to your wardrobe with this stylish french connection clutch, crafted from superior materials. Pair these with unlikely pieces in your wardrobe be it pastel hues or colour pops. Product Details Black shimmery box clutch with metal buckle detail on top Has a press button closure Has a detachable chain strap and a fabric inner Material and Care Textile, polyurethane Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size  Height: 10 cm Width: 14 cm Depth: 4 cm
